To extend invite expiry for all candidates in a test, see Configure test invite settings . To extend invite expiry for all candidates in a test, see Configure test invite settings . To extend invite expiry for specific candidates in a test, see Set an expiry date . To extend invite expiry for specific candidates in a test, see Set an expiry date . Need support?
